rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports, and in implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Insert AGREE contracts inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks following AADL component type or implementation structure.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers from the AADL model to define AGREE assumptions and guarantees.
Ensure AGREE expressions align with the data types of AADL ports and properties.
Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponents or ports in component type annexes.
Do not include AADL property names (e.g., Deadline, Period) as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference valid AADL feature names and types.
Boolean expressions in AGREE should match the data type of the referenced port or variable.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes unless they are valid in that scope.
Do not reference opaque Boolean or enumeration data as numeric values in AGREE expressions.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of component structure
